metadata.description: Name of the environment (e.g. dev, test, prod). Used to generate unique resource names.
Object ID of the identity that runs deployments — used as SQL Active Directory admin.

properties.description: Service Bus Data Owner for Red Dog services
Cosmos DB Data Contributor for loyalty-service
Storage Blob Data Contributor for receipt-service Dapr binding
Key Vault Secrets User for all services
ACR Pull for all container apps

metadata.description: Object ID of the deploying principal (user or SP) — set as SQL Active Directory admin.

properties.description: Service Bus Data Owner for Red Dog services
Cosmos DB Data Contributor for loyalty-service
Storage Blob Data Contributor for receipt-service Dapr binding
Key Vault Secrets User for all services
ACR Pull for all container apps

secrets.value: [union(createArray(createObject('name', 'appinsights-connection-string', 'keyVaultUrl', format('{0}secrets/appinsights-connection-string', reference('keyVault').outputs.uri.value), 'identity', reference('identity').outputs.identityId.value)), createArray(createObject('name', 'sql-server-fqdn', 'keyVaultUrl', format('{0}secrets/sql-server-fqdn', reference('keyVault').outputs.uri.value), 'identity', reference('identity').outputs.identityId.value), createObject('name', 'sql-database-name', 'keyVaultUrl', format('{0}secrets/sql-database-name', reference('keyVault').outputs.uri.value), 'identity', reference('identity').outputs.identityId.value)))]

configuration.ingress: [if(equals(parameters('ingressType'), 'none'), null(), createObject('external', equals(parameters('ingressType'), 'external'), 'targetPort', parameters('containerPort'), 'transport', 'http', 'allowInsecure', false(), 'corsPolicy', if(equals(parameters('ingressType'), 'external'), createObject('allowedOrigins', createArray('*'), 'allowedMethods', createArray('GET', 'POST', 'PUT', 'DELETE', 'OPTIONS'), 'allowedHeaders', createArray('*')), null())))]
configuration.dapr: [if(parameters('daprEnabled'), createObject('enabled', true(), 'appId', parameters('daprAppId'), 'appPort', parameters('daprAppPort'), 'appProtocol', 'http', 'enableApiLogging', false(), 'logLevel', 'info'), createObject('enabled', false()))]
